hero.headline: Heritage. Refined. Gifted.
hero.lede: The art of the Moroccan terroir and its ancestral rituals.
hero.alt: Barbaria: a Moroccan editorial composition in natural light.

editorial.photo_alt: Hands of a Berber cooperative artisan, cold-pressing argan oil at first light
editorial.headline: An object becomes a gesture.
editorial.p1: Every Barbaria piece carries the hand of a Moroccan artisan and the season of its terroir. We compose them into gifts that mean something: to the buyer, to the recipient, to the cooperative that made them.
editorial.p2: No off-the-shelf templates. Every inquiry begins with a conversation.

bento.cosmetiques_lede: Gift boxes of scrubs, beldi soaps, oils and hydrosols. For hotels, spas and B2B private label.
bento.epicerie_lede: Gift boxes of argan oil, saffron, honeys and the spice trade of Morocco.
bento.compose_lede: Tell us about the moment. A concierge composes the box with you within 24 hours.

heritage_3up.quote: Every ritual preserves a legacy. Every gift sustains an artisan.
heritage_3up.c2_body: Six ateliers, fairly compensated, named on every product.
heritage_3up.c3_body: Made-to-order at the atelier, in volume that matches the moment.

rituals.empty_state: No items match the current filters.

story.hero_lede: From antiquity to today: one land, one people, one excellence.
story.ch1_p1: Barbaria, from the Latin Barbaria, named the lands of the Berbers, a free people of Mediterranean shores and Saharan depths.
story.ch1_p2: Long before the Romans, the Amazigh cultivated the sacred argan tree, harvested saffron and mastered the art of spices. Their women tattooed onto their skin the signs of the Tifinagh alphabet, carrying the memory of the world without committing it to script.
story.ch2_p1: From the Sahara to Moorish Spain, Berber caravans carried argan, saffron and ras el hanout as currency. Marrakech, founded by the Almoravids who were themselves Berbers, became the crossroads of taste.
story.ch2_p2: The hammam rose as the temple of purification, with its black soaps, its precious oils and its ritual scrubs passed from mother to daughter inside the shaded riads.
story.ch3_title: The Legacy of the Berber Women
story.ch3_p1: In the villages of the Souss, women formed the first argan oil cooperatives. In the Middle Atlas, they distilled rose and orange blossom to capture the soul of the seasons.
story.ch3_p2: Every gesture was ritualised, every ingredient carried intention. It is this inheritance that Barbaria Morocco carries forward.
story.ch4_p1: Barbaria Morocco is born of one conviction: the treasures of the Moroccan terroir deserve to be shared with the world. Our cosmetics celebrate the work of women's cooperatives and artisans of the land.
story.ch4_p2: Every bottle, every pot, every soap carries the imprint of a generous earth and a free people, the Imazighen, who have always known how to turn nature into gold.
story.pull_quote: What you give carries who you are.
story.amazigh_intro: Tifinagh is one of the oldest writing systems still alive in the world. Each letter is a fragment of history, carved into stone, tattooed onto skin, woven into rugs. Six signs that guide our house.
story.sym_yaz_desc: The identity emblem of the Amazigh people: a free human standing on their land, arms raised to the sky. The heart of Berber identity, carved into stone for millennia.
story.sym_yay_desc: An ancestral sign for the cycle of life and the perpetual renewal of nature. Woven into rugs, tattooed onto women's skin, marking the sacred moments of existence.
story.sym_yak_desc: Carved onto amulets and the doors of houses, the sign invoked divine protection. It accompanied the caravans across the Sahara, guarding travellers from the dangers of the desert.
story.sym_yam_desc: Water is sacred in the arid lands of the Maghreb. The sign holds the springs and the wadis that give life, the abundance and generosity of the mother earth.
story.sym_yan_desc: The sign that binds the living to their ancestors. The nourishing earth, the deep roots of a people who have inhabited these mountains and these plains since the dawn of time.
story.sym_yar_desc: The sun guides and illuminates. Associated with the solar star, the sign carries the wisdom of the elders, the light of knowledge passed from generation to generation around the campfires.

ateliers.hero_lede: Barbaria works with six Moroccan cooperatives across argan, rose, ceramic, cedar, weaving and clay traditions.

journal.meta_description: Field notes, dispatches, portraits. Six editorial pieces from the Barbaria atelier and its cooperative partners across Morocco.

footer.rights: © 2026 Barbaria Morocco · Ancestral Beauty, Contemporary Excellence.

cookies.banner_body: We use cookies strictly necessary to run the site and, with your consent, audience-measurement cookies that help us understand how you visit us.
cookies.cat_necessary_desc: Cookies essential to the site's operation: admin session, language preference. Always on.
cookies.cat_analytics_desc: Vercel Analytics and Speed Insights. Aggregated and anonymised data that helps us improve the site's performance.

amazigh_proverb.quote: No one is a stranger on the land of their ancestors.

wizard.size_title: How many stars in this box?
wizard.size_lede: Each star is a piece. Compose three, five, or six.
wizard.size_3_desc: The foundational arc: steam, oil and floral water.
wizard.size_5_desc: The full ritual: steam, oil, serum, water, and gesture.
wizard.size_6_desc: The full ritual plus a free star, chosen by you.
wizard.step_no_products: No piece yet in this category. The concierge will compose this slot with you.
wizard.review_lede: Review the stars you've placed before sending the request.
wizard.quantity_lede: Set the order quantity. The concierge returns with a quote within 24 hours.
wizard.quantity_below_min_note: Below the {n}-unit minimum, the concierge may adjust pricing on small batches.
wizard.done_title: Your composition is on its way.
wizard.done_lede: Tell us where to send it. The concierge replies within 24 hours.
wizard.exit_confirm: You will lose your composition. Are you sure you want to leave?
